misconfig_patterns: No auth in default deployment — search and document APIs fully open
Config server at :19071 exposes full application topology without auth
/ApplicationStatus leaks cluster composition and Vespa version

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include com.yahoo.vespa — uniquely identifies Vespa config server

deployment_tells: GET :19071/ApplicationStatus returns com.yahoo.vespa namespace — uniquely identifies Vespa
GET /config/v1/ exposes namespace and document types without auth
Search endpoint at :8080/search/ accepts queries without auth
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
